description: A postdoctoral researcher needs to visually triage their literature library containing 18 papers tagged with 'deep-learning', 'foundational', 'computer-vision', and 'NLP'. Assign a unique color and a specific position number to each of these four tags: 'deep-learning' at Position 1, 'foundational' at Position 2, 'computer-vision' at Position 3, and 'NLP' at Position 4. Ensure each tag is assigned a visually distinct color.
